label: Uncomplicated TMJ pain without dental, deep-space, or neurologic red flags
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated TMJ pain/disorder.
No dental infection, deep-space infection, trismus, airway symptoms, trauma/fracture concern, neurologic deficit, cardiac chest pain mimic, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Dental infection, deep-space swelling, trismus, airway symptoms, drooling, fever/systemic illness, facial trauma/fracture concern, neurologic deficit, severe headache, or cardiac chest-pain concern.
Pregnancy/pediatric pathway or specialist-directed ENT/dental/oral-surgery plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care, dentist, oral surgery, or ENT if symptoms persist, recur, or your clinician told you to recheck.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports TMJ-disorder framing and supportive care such as jaw rest and avoiding hard chewing. Autonomous Phase 1901-2000 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated TMJ pain/disorder without dental/deep-space infection, trismus, airway symptoms, trauma/fracture concern, neurologic deficit, cardiac mimic, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports TMJ-disorder framing and supportive care such as jaw rest and avoiding hard chewing. Autonomous Phase 1901-2000 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated TMJ pain/disorder without dental/deep-space infection, trismus, airway symptoms, trauma/fracture concern, neurologic deficit, cardiac mimic, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated TMJ pain/disorder
no dental infection, deep-space infection, trismus, neurologic deficit, trauma, or cardiac mimic documented
